CustomField.description: Attaches the interaction log to this Operator, Counterparty or Lessor Account. If the log is created from the corresponding Operator, Counterparty or Lessor Account, this field will be auto populated
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Attaches the interaction log to this Operator, Counterparty or Lessor Account. If the log is created from the corresponding Operator, Counterparty or Lessor Account, this field will be auto populated.
CustomField.label: Related To Account
